pivHint: FAINT isn't just what God promises to refresh and satisfy in Jeremiah. The person who cares for a patient passed out at the hospital is the ______.
winText: You found it. FAINT isn't just the weary soul God refreshes - the answer is also the word for someone who cares for a patient at the hospital, and the same word for a mother who nurses her baby. NURSE.
lossText: The word was NURSE. FAINT was the pivot - the FAINT soul God refreshes, and NURSE is both who cares for a patient at the hospital and what a mother does for her baby.
votdVerse: I will refresh the weary and satisfy the faint.
passageText: This is what the LORD Almighty, the God of Israel, says: 'When I bring them back from captivity, the people in the land of Judah and in its towns will once again use these words: The LORD bless you, you prosperous city, you sacred mountain.' People will live together in Judah and all its towns - farmers and those who move about with their flocks. I will refresh the weary and satisfy the faint.
